coach_notes: To build a strong technology career, focus on learning Python and SQL first, as they are foundational for many tech roles like data analysis and backend development. Start with free online resources like Codecademy or Coursera to practice coding, and build small projects to apply your skills. Your customer service and IT support background gives you a great base—combine it with these technical skills to become a well-rounded candidate.

jobs.title: Field Technical Support
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Strong alignment with IT support, hardware/software, and customer service skills. Bilingual ability (Spanish/English) is a plus for field support.
jobs.gaps: No specific field experience or certifications (e.g., A+) mentioned; may need to demonstrate on-site troubleshooting skills.

jobs.title: IT Technical Support
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Direct match with IT support role; skills in customer service, hardware/software, and bilingual communication are highly relevant.
jobs.gaps: May need to highlight specific support tools or ticketing systems experience; no advanced certifications mentioned.

jobs.title: US- Technical Solutions Analyst
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: IT support and bilingual skills are relevant for technical solutions analysis. Organization and teamwork are transferable.
jobs.gaps: Lacks experience in technical analysis, problem-solving at a higher level, and possibly knowledge of specific tools or methodologies.

jobs.title: Network Support Internship
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Basic IT support and hardware/software knowledge provide a foundation for networking. Bilingual and teamwork skills are beneficial.
jobs.gaps: No networking-specific experience or coursework; needs to develop skills in network protocols, configuration, and troubleshooting.

jobs.title: Junior Technical Writer for Banking Solutions (m/f/d)
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Bilingual skills (Spanish/English) and translation experience are relevant for technical writing in banking solutions.
jobs.gaps: No technical writing experience, banking domain knowledge, or familiarity with documentation tools; major skill gaps in writing and finance.
